name: create-purchase-order
description: Creates a standard purchase order in S/4HANA Cloud. Requires supplier, material, quantity, and plant. Confirms with user before writing.
utterances: Create a PO for 100 units of MAT-1001 from vendor V-500
Order 500 pieces of material 4711 from supplier Acme
New PO for MAT-2000, 250 units, plant 1710
Buy 1000 units of MAT-1001 from V-500 for plant 1710

parameters.name: supplierId
parameters.description: Supplier / vendor ID (e.g. V-500). If user gave a company name, resolve via BusinessPartner.search first.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Order quantity in the material's base unit of measure.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Receiving plant code (e.g. 1710). If missing, ask the user.

parameters.name: purchasingGroup
parameters.description: Purchasing group for the PO. Default 001.

parameters.name: documentDate
parameters.description: PO document date. Defaults to today.
